services.name: Hair Dye and Wash
services.longDescription: Complete hair coloring service with professional dye application and thorough washing for vibrant, long-lasting color.

services.name: Hair Protein Treatment
services.shortDescription: Nourishing protein treatment for damaged hair
services.longDescription: Restore your hair's strength and vitality with our protein treatment, perfect for damaged, weak, or chemically treated hair.

services.name: Shoulder Length Keratin Treatment
services.shortDescription: Keratin treatment for shoulder length hair
services.longDescription: Smooth and straighten your shoulder-length hair with our professional keratin treatment for frizz-free, manageable hair.

services.name: Mid Length Keratin Treatment
services.shortDescription: Keratin treatment for mid length hair
services.longDescription: Professional keratin treatment for mid-length hair to achieve smooth, shiny, and frizz-free results.

services.name: Hip Length Keratin Treatment
services.shortDescription: Keratin treatment for hip length hair
services.longDescription: Complete keratin treatment for long hip-length hair, providing smooth, manageable, and frizz-free results.
